---
applyTo: "tests/{specs,healed,generated}/**/*.spec.js"
---

# Page Object Model rules for Playwright specs (STRICT)

Specs in `tests/specs/`, `tests/healed/`, and `tests/generated/` MUST use the
Page Object Model. Violations are rejected by
`scripts/validate-test-structure.js`.

## Required imports

```js
'use strict';
const { test, expect } = require('../fixtures/base.fixture');
const { CREDENTIALS }  = require('../data/testData');
```

NEVER import `{ test, expect }` directly from `@playwright/test` in a spec.
NEVER import `TEST_EMPLOYEE`, `ROUTES`, or any domain-specific hardcoded symbols.

The app under test is the OrangeHRM React SPA. Page objects wrap `.oxd-` React
selectors (e.g. `input[name="username"]`, `.oxd-button`, `.oxd-main-menu-item`).

## Required test signature

Receive `page`, `sh`, and `uniqueSuffix` from the base fixture.
Instantiate story-specific page objects in the spec body:

```js
const { PimPage } = require('../pages/PimPage');

test('...', async ({ page, sh, uniqueSuffix }, testInfo) => {
  const featurePage = new PimPage(page);
  await featurePage.navigate();
  await featurePage.fillFirstName(`Employee-${uniqueSuffix}`);
  await featurePage.save();
});
```

Story-specific page objects (e.g. `LoginPage`, `PimPage`, `AdminPage`) are
generated by `scripts/generate-playwright.js` into `tests/pages/<StoryClass>Page.js`
with locators in `tests/locators/<StoryClass>.locators.js`.

## Forbidden in specs

The validator rejects any of these patterns inside a spec file:

- `page.locator('<selector>')`
- `page.getByRole(...)`, `page.getByText(...)`, `page.getByLabel(...)`,
  `page.getByPlaceholder(...)`, `page.getByTestId(...)` called on `page`
- `page.click('<selector>')`, `page.fill('<selector>', ...)`,
  `page.type('<selector>', ...)`, `page.selectOption('<selector>', ...)`
- `page.$('...')`, `page.$$('...')`
- Inline credentials, field values, URLs (use `tests/data/testData.js`)

If you need a new interaction:
1. Add the locator to `tests/locators/<StoryClass>.locators.js`.
2. Add a method (`fillX`, `clickY`, `assertZ`) to `tests/pages/<StoryClass>Page.js`.
3. Call the new method from the spec.
